memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas & Agnes Fytche
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas and Agnes Fitch are commemorated in a stained glass window at the Church of St. Mary the Virgin, Lindsell, Essex, England

memoryArtifacts.headline: Agnes wife of Thomas Humfrey born circa 1497
memoryArtifacts.description: She brought with her to the marriage, land in Weedon Beck. This is subsequently willed to their son John

memoryArtifacts.headline: From Find A Grave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Agnes Algore was the only child and heiress of Robert and Margaret Algore. She was married before December 22, 1490 to Thomas Fitch, with whom she had issue.

Agnes Fitch and her husband, Thomas Fitch …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Alger於大約1471年出生在英國艾可林瑟爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Allgar37歲，母親Margaret Cowley32歲。她於1490年12月22日之前與Thomas Fitch在英國艾可林瑟爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1533年9月在她的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國艾可武特萊斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Alger于大约1471年出生在英国艾可林瑟爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert Allgar37岁，母亲Margaret Cowley32岁。她于1490年12月22日之前与Thomas Fitch在英国艾可林瑟爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1533年9月在她的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国艾可武特萊斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Alger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Alger. Pronounced with a soft g it is from Old French Alg(i)er, Aug(i)er (ancient Germanic Adalgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gāri ‘spear’); see Auger . Pronounced with a hard g, it is a variant of Algar .
Scottish and English: in Scotland, Alger may be a variant of Algeo .
German: from a shortened form of the ancient Germanic personal name Adalgar (see 1 above).

variants.name: Auger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Gaston, Lucien, Marcel, Mederic, Normand, Raoul, Cecile, Emile, Fernand, Gaetan.

French: from the Old French personal name Auger, which can be from ancient Germanic Adalgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gaira- ‘lance, spear’, or Albgari, with the first element alb ‘elf’. Compare Auge , Oge , Ogea , and Osier .

variants.name: Algar
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Algar, representing the falling together of two Old English names, Ælfgār and Æthelgār, composed of the elements respectively ælf ‘elf’ or æthel ‘noble’ + gār ‘spear’. It could also be from the much rarer Old English personal name Ealdgār, composed of elements meaning ‘old’ + ‘spear’. In East Anglia, it is more probably a variant of Alger (Old Norse Álfgeirr). See also Agar , Elgar .

variants.name: Alker
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Frieda, Gerhart.
English: habitational name from Altcar, Lancashire. This name means ‘marshland by the River Alt’, from Old Norse kjarr ‘marsh’ and the river name Alt.

variants.name: Ager
meanings: English (mainly Essex, Suffolk, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Alger   or possibly of   Edgar  .
Danish: habitational name from any of several places called Ager, meaning ‘plowed land’ (from a cognate of the English word acre).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Adgari, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’. This surname is very rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Alger was born about 1471, in Lindsell, Essex, England, her father, Sir Robert Allgar, was 37 and her mother, Margaret Cowley, was 32. She married Thomas Fitch before 22 December 1490, in Lindsell, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died in September 1533, in her hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Uttlesford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Alger est née environ 1471, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Allgar, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cowley, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fitch avant 22 décembre 1490, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en septembre 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Uttlesford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Alger um 1471 in Lindsell, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Allgar 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret Cowley 32. Sie hat vor 22. Dezember 1490 in Lindsell, Essex, England Thomas Fitch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im September 1533 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Uttlesford, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Alger è nata il circa 1471 nel Lindsell, Essex, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Allgar, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margaret Cowley, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fitch prima del 22 dicembre 1490, nel Lindsell, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Uttlesford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Algerが約1471年にイギリスエセックスリンドセルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Allgarは37歳，母Margaret Cowleyは32歳であった。1490年12月22日以前にイギリスエセックスリンドセルでThomas Fitchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1533年9月に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウットレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Alger(이)가 대략 1471년 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Allgar(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cowley(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1490년 12월 22일 이전 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 Thomas Fitch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1533년 9월 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 우틀레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Alger nasceu aproximadamente 1471, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Allgar, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cowley, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fitch antes 22 de dezembro de 1490, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em setembro de 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ro.Little Canfield, Essex, England: Little Canfield, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Alger родилась около 1471 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Allgar было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cowley, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fitch перед 22 декабрь 1490 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла сентябрь 1533 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности уттлесфорд, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Thomas Fitch antes de 22 de diciembre de 1490, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra.
